jobDescription: Bird is a last-mile electric vehicle sharing company dedicated to bringing safe, low-cost, environmentally-friendly transportation solutions to communities across the world. We provide a fleet of electric, shared scooters that can be accessed via smartphone. Bird is headquartered in Venice, California and is rapidly expanding across the country and the world. Bird is looking for data-driven, strategic thinkers to join the Strategic Operations team to tackle some of the highest impact and most challenging problems we face across our global operations. This individual will analyze metrics, draw conclusions from data sets, build scalable systems, and deliver actionable insights to stakeholders across the organization. If you are someone who enjoys fast-paced environments and conceptualizing strategies, then this is a great role for you. What You'll Do Assist the Strategic Operations team in the development of constantly evolving strategies to scale Bird globally Execute several highly visible processes and deliver updates to executive stakeholders Monitor business performance across relevant KPIs and conduct deep dive investigations to understand the “why” behind how metrics are performing Perform ad hoc strategy, research, modeling, and analytics projects to help guide decision making in a brand new and constantly evolving industry Have the ability to execute projects of varying urgency and scope with limited guidance What You'll Need3+ years of experience of consulting / investment banking / business intelligence / strategy / high-growth operations or startup experience Strong communication, organization and stakeholder management skills Strong, demonstrated analytical and critical thinking ability Demonstrated ability to deliver results in a fast paced environment Growth mindset: you seek out learning opportunities for yourself Bachelor's degree from a competitive university Strong Excel and Power Point skills SQL experience a plus but not required
